title: SEO Audit Plan
body:
# IssueByte — Technical SEO Audit Report

**Audit Date:** 2026-04-01  
**Site:** issuebyte.com (Next.js 14, App Router)

---

## Executive Summary

The codebase has a solid SEO foundation (structured data, canonical URLs, sitemap, robots.txt) but had several critical issues affecting indexability and social sharing. All critical and high-priority code fixes have been applied. This document tracks remaining work.

---

## FIXED (Commit f370bde)

### 1. Wrong Domain Fallbacks — CRITICAL
- All files fell back to `choicompany-site.vercel.app` or `example.com`. Canonical URLs, sitemap, and robots.txt all pointed to the wrong domain.
- Fixed in: `robots.ts`, `layout.tsx`, `sitemap.ts`, `page.tsx`, `blog/[slug]/page.tsx`, `tools/[slug]/page.tsx`, `compare/page.tsx`, `compare/[slug]/page.tsx`

### 2. Sitemap Missing Tool and Comparison Pages — CRITICAL
- `sitemap.ts` only included top-level routes. Individual tool review pages (`/tools/chatgpt`, etc.) and comparison detail pages were absent — Googlebot could not discover them.
- Fixed: Sitemap now calls `getAllToolSlugs()` and `getAllComparisonSlugs()` to auto-generate all routes.

### 3. Missing OG Image in Global Metadata — HIGH
- No `og:image` or `twitter:image` defined anywhere. All social shares showed no preview image.
- Fixed: Added `og:image` (`/og-default.png`, 1200x630) and `twitter:image` to root `layout.tsx` metadata.
- **Still needed:** Create `public/og-default.png` image file.

### 4. Duplicate NewsletterSignup Component — MEDIUM
- `blog/[slug]/page.tsx` rendered the newsletter signup twice in sequence. Removed duplicate.

### 5. Wrong siteName Fallback in Blog Post Page — MEDIUM
- Blog post Article schema fell back to `Choi Company Blog` for publisher name. Updated to `IssueByte`.

### 6. Stale Keyword Year — LOW
- `compare/page.tsx` had `AI tools 2024`. Updated to `AI tools 2026`.

---

## OPEN — High Priority

### 7. Create OG Default Image
- **File needed:** `public/og-default.png` (1200x630px)
- Without this file the og:image tag 404s and social previews remain broken for all pages that don't have page-specific images.

### 8. Confirm NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL in Vercel
- Verify the env var is set to `https://issuebyte.com` in the Vercel production environment.

### 9. Article Schema Missing `image` Property
- **File:** `app/blog/[slug]/page.tsx` ~line 88
- Google requires an `image` field in Article JSON-LD for article rich results.
- Fix: Add `image` referencing `post.coverImage` and add `coverImage` to article frontmatter.

### 10. AggregateRating `ratingCount` is Hardcoded
- **File:** `app/tools/[slug]/page.tsx` line 104 — `ratingCount: 128` is identical on every tool.
- Google may suppress rich results when it detects static fake review counts.
- Fix: Add real `ratingCount` per tool in `lib/tools.ts`, or remove AggregateRating until real data exists.

---

## OPEN — Medium Priority

### 11. FAQ Schema Not Implemented
- `FAQPage` schema on tool review pages enables SERP FAQ features (high CTR boost).
- Add FAQ sections with 3-5 questions per tool page.

### 12. Homepage Tool Grid Is Hardcoded
- `app/page.tsx` has a separate hardcoded tool list (6 tools) that will not reflect new tools added to `lib/tools.ts`.
- Fix: Import tools from `lib/tools.ts`.

### 13. Category Filter Pills Not Functional
- Filter buttons are static `<span>` elements. Add client-side filtering or category-filtered URLs.

### 14. Compare Detail Pages Have No Structured Data
- `app/compare/[slug]/page.tsx` has no JSON-LD. Add Article + BreadcrumbList schemas.

### 15. `wordCount` in Article Schema Is Approximate
- `parseInt(post.readingTime) * 200` reverses the actual calculation and loses precision.
- Fix: Export real `wordCount` from `lib/posts.ts`.

---

## OPEN — Low Priority

### 16. Tag Archive Pages Have No Meta Description
- Add dynamic descriptions like `Browse all articles tagged X on IssueByte.`

### 17. Verify `/reviews` Route Returns Content
- Multiple CTAs across the site link to `/reviews` — confirm it does not 404.

### 18. Missing `<link rel="preconnect">` for Google Fonts
- Add preconnect hint in `app/layout.tsx` for better font load and Core Web Vitals.

### 19. Search Console Ownership Not Confirmed
- Add a Google Search Console verification meta tag or ensure DNS TXT record is set.

### 20. No `dateModified` Field on Articles
- Posts use publish date for both `datePublished` and `dateModified`. Add a `lastModified` frontmatter field.

---

## Sitemap Coverage After Fix

| Route Type | Before | After |
|---|---|---|
| Static pages | 6 | 6 |
| Tool review pages `/tools/[slug]` | 0 | 9 |
| Comparison detail pages `/compare/[slug]` | 0 | dynamic |
| Blog posts | 34 | 34 |
| Tag archives | yes | yes |

---

## Structured Data Coverage

| Page | Schema | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Homepage | WebSite, Organization, SearchAction | OK |
| Blog post | Article, BreadcrumbList | OK — missing image |
| Tool review | SoftwareApplication, AggregateRating | OK — fake ratingCount |
| Comparison detail | None | needs Article + Breadcrumb |
| Tag archive | None | low priority |

---

## Core Web Vitals Checklist

- Next.js Image optimization with AVIF/WebP: enabled
- HTTP compression: enabled
- font-display: swap on Google Fonts: enabled
- preconnect hint for fonts: missing
- Actual LCP/CLS scores require Lighthouse on live URL

---

## Next Actions (Ordered)

1. Set `NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL=https://issuebyte.com` in Vercel dashboard
2. Create `public/og-default.png` (1200x630px)
3. Fix `ratingCount` in tool data or remove AggregateRating
4. Add `image` to Article schema + `coverImage` to article frontmatter
5. Add FAQ schema to top tool review pages
6. Fix homepage tool grid to import from `lib/tools.ts`
7. Submit updated sitemap to Google Search Console
